Dear Dr. Tan,  

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Scientist at XYZ Corporation Pte. Ltd. under the terms of this employment offer letter (the "Offer Letter"). Your monthly salary will be SGD 8,500, payable in accordance with our standard payroll practices.  

Your employment is subject to the successful verification of your credentials, including your NRIC number S1234567A. Please visit https://example.sg/user/S1234567A to complete your onboarding process. Your expected start date will be 1 November 2023.  

Please note that the project plan you submitted will require further revisions to align with our current project status. We are confident that your expertise will bring significant contributions to our team.  

To accept this offer, please sign below and return a copy by 20 October 2023.  

Sincerely,  

Mr. John Lim  
Head of Human Resources  
XYZ Corporation Pte. Ltd.
